name: Ami
goal: Ami wants to spend exactly two weeks in Tokyo to fully immerse herself in its vibrant culture by visiting iconic landmarks, sampling local cuisine, and attending traditional festivals during the holiday season.
backstory: Ami, a travel enthusiast, has always been fascinated by Japanese culture and is planning a dream holiday to Tokyo. Having previously visited Osaka, Ami is now eager to explore Tokyo's unique blend of traditional and modern attractions. With a passion for food, history, and entertainment, Ami aims to create an unforgettable experience in Tokyo.

focus_notes.cost: For Ami, cost focus means finding a balance between experiencing Tokyo's best attractions and staying within a reasonable budget to ensure the trip is affordable for all participants
focus_notes.comfort: Ami prioritizes comfort by selecting convenient and clean accommodations, as well as planning for regular breaks during busy days of sightseeing in Tokyo
focus_notes.time: Time focus for Ami means creating an efficient itinerary that allows the group to make the most of their time in Tokyo, without feeling rushed or missing out on key experiences
focus_notes.safety: Ami's safety focus involves researching safe areas to stay and visit, understanding local customs to avoid unintentionally offending locals, and having a plan in place for emergencies
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Flexibility is crucial for Ami, as it allows the group to adapt their plans if unexpected opportunities or changes arise during the trip, ensuring they can make the most of their time in Tokyo
